text:
Created attachment 245534
git format-patch -1 main

ChangeLog: https://github.com/whiterabbitsecurity/connector/compare/1.51...1.52

- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- "portfmt -D Makefile" is happy.
- Tested with:
13.2-RELEASE-p4
portlint 2.20.0
portfmt 1.1.5
pkg 1.20.990.5
poudriere-git-3.3.99.20220831_1
perl 5.34.1_3
openssl 1.1.1t-freebsd
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
